assessment.note: Names two specific absences — clearer prioritization and more air cover in cross-team decisions — which is a strong clarity deficit; [THREAD-DEFERRED-WINDDOWN] 'air cover in cross-team decisions' could be worth unpacking next session.

new_queue.label: Support needed
